assertions.title: Annotation fields encrypted at rest

steps.action: Discover direct validation surface for POST/GET /api/annotations in foundation code
steps.expected: Existing endpoint + vitest integration test covering DB ciphertext and decrypted readback
steps.observed: No matching /src/app/api/annotations route files found in this milestone surface

steps.action: Run targeted vitest suites with closest related behavior
steps.expected: Assertion-scoped test proving ciphertext-at-rest and plaintext readback
steps.observed: src/lib/dashboard/__tests__/annotations.test.ts passed and validates decryption behavior with mocked DB/encryption, but does not validate POST/GET endpoint flow or DB ciphertext inequality

assertions.issues: Assertion requires endpoint + DB roundtrip evidence; foundation test surface only provides mocked unit tests.

assertions.title: Baseline values encrypted at rest

steps.expected: Test that reads metric_baselines.value_encrypted raw, confirms JSON.parse() fails pre-decrypt, then validates decrypted payload fields
steps.observed: No test references metric_baselines in *.test.ts files
src/lib/dashboard/__tests__/baselines.test.ts passed and validates finite BaselinePayload shape using mocked data paths, not raw DB ciphertext behavior

assertions.issues: No direct vitest integration test for metric_baselines at-rest ciphertext in current milestone surface.

assertions.title: Dismissed insights unique constraint

steps.action: Search for dismissed_insights assertion coverage in tests
steps.expected: Test proving duplicate insert with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING keeps one row and unchanged dismissed_at
steps.observed: No dismissed_insights references found in *.test.ts files
No existing targeted vitest suite for dismissed_insights duplicate insert idempotency behavior

assertions.issues: Assertion cannot be validated via existing vitest tests in this milestone.

assertions.title: CASCADE deletion cleans up derived tables

steps.expected: Test deleting users row and asserting zero dependent rows across all 3 derived tables
steps.observed: No test references these tables in *.test.ts files
Existing cascade tests in schema suite target other tables and do not cover the three derived dashboard tables required by this assertion

assertions.issues: No existing vitest coverage for required cascade verification on dashboard-derived tables.

frictions.description: Assigned VAL-DB assertions are not directly represented in current vitest suites; closest available suites are unit tests with mocked DB/encryption paths.
frictions.resolution: Captured test coverage search evidence and ran the closest targeted suites to confirm current surface gap.

blockers.description: Missing assertion-scoped vitest integration tests and missing foundation API surface for /api/annotations and /api/insights dismissal flows required by VAL-DB-001 and VAL-DB-003 semantics.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched for existing routes/tests and executed nearest relevant suites; no direct surface found.

blockers.description: No existing vitest tests validate raw at-rest ciphertext behavior for metric_baselines or cascade cleanup on metric_baselines/user_annotations/dismissed_insights.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran targeted baseline/annotation suites and repository-wide test coverage searches to confirm coverage gap.

summary: Ran targeted vitest command: 2 files passed (63 tests), but all 4 assigned VAL-DB assertions are blocked due missing assertion-scoped vitest coverage/surface at foundation.
